name: Lady Gaga
abstract: Stefani Joanne Angelina Germanotta (born March 28, 1986), known professionally as Lady Gaga, is an American singer, songwriter, and actress. Known for her image reinventions and versatility across the entertainment industry, she is an influential figure in popular music.

about_quotes.speaker: Jane Monheit
about_quotes.evidence: I’ll go to the gym with like Lady Gaga screaming in my headphones
about_quotes.doc_title: Jane Monheit interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, August 20, 2010

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: Everybody’s artistic. Lady Gaga’s artistic. That’s not the point.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Branford Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: Like somebody said to me, you know, “What do you think about Clarence Clemons playing on a Lady Gaga record?” Nothing. I don’t think anything of it.
about_quotes.doc_title: Branford Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Nancy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: I can’t talk about Lady Gaga and people like that, because that’s like – has nothing to do with – who can sing is Beyoncé.
about_quotes.doc_title: Nancy Wilson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Porrello
about_quotes.evidence: Tom Porrello has played trumpet with a lengthy list of artists, including ... Lady Gaga.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Porrello interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 6, 2023
